case_title: WSFS, FSB, AS TRUSTEE FOR CVI SGP ACQUIS TRUST VS. BRENDA MARKHAM ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WSFS, FSB, AS TRUSTEE FOR CVI SGP ACQUIS TRUST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARKHAM, BRENDA $4,300.75 PRINCIPAL, $298.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,599.25, SEE SCANNED DOC
